title: InsidePlane Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function InsidePlane (PlaneNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: PlaneNumber	Integer expression from 1 to 15 representing which approach check plane to return status for.
description: Returns the check status of the approach check plane.
see_also:
InsideBox

Plane

InsidePlane Example

VB Example:

Dim isInside As Boolean

isInside = m_spel.InsidePlane(1)

C# Example:

bool isInside;

isInside = m_spel.InsidePlane(1);
examples:
Dim isInside As Boolean
isInside = m_spel.InsidePlane(1)
